title: Tinker's Vein Miner
description: Integrates the VeinMiner mod with Tinker's Construct as a modifier.
body:
# Tinker's Vein Miner

This is a mod that give's access to the [Vein Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/vein-mining)
enchantment in the form of a modifier for [Tinker's Construct](https://modrinth.com/mod/tinkers-construct)

Although Tinker's Construct already has its own "Vein Hammer", it's, for lack of a better word,
shit.

The modifier is added using Nether Brick.
